title: What happened to Charleston White? YouTuber shot at in Houston by group
summary_full: Charleston White says he was shot at during a visit to Houston's Fifth Ward after a group allegedly confronted him over past remarks and asked him to apologize. In a livestream, the comedian confirmed he was not injured, shared his version of the incident, and said he plans to file a report with the FBI.
